mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS doctorId, d.name, d.phone, dept.name AS departmentName, t.name AS titleName, d.created_at AS createdAt, da.specialty, da.introduction, da.certificate_url AS certificateUrl, da.qualification_url AS qualificationUrl FROM doctor d INNER JOIN doctor_audit da ON d.id = da.doctor_id LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN title t ON d.title_id = t.id WHERE da.audit_status = 0 ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
